title: Federal Reserve Board - 2025 FOMC Press Releases
summary: This source is a Federal Reserve index page listing links to 2025 FOMC press releases and economic projections, but it does not contain the actual statement text or content. The page shows that FOMC statements were issued on 8 dates throughout 2025 (January 29, March 19, May 7, June 18, July 30, September 17, October 29, December 10), alongside corresponding economic projections on 4 dates. No policy decisions, forward guidance, vote tallies, or substantive content are provided in this source.
key_points: This is an index/listing page, not an individual FOMC statement or archival document
The page contains only dates and titles of 8 FOMC statements issued in 2025
Economic projections from 4 FOMC meetings are also listed (March, June, September, December)
No actual statement text, policy decisions, or forward guidance is included in this source
The source provides no information about rate decisions, balance sheet actions, or vote tallies
Page content word count is only 159 words, confirming this is a navigation/listing page
why_it_matters: This source cannot serve as an archival record for macro catalysts research because it lacks any actual policy content. A researcher would need to navigate to individual FOMC statement pages to access the substantive information needed for analysis.

issues_found: Source is a listing/index page containing only dates and titles of FOMC statements, not actual statement content
PAGE_TYPE metadata shows 'press_release' but source body confirms this is functionally a listing page with 159 words
No policy decisions, rate changes, or forward guidance can be extracted
event_type is 'unknown' and cannot be determined without actual FOMC statement text
No archival value - researchers would need to access individual FOMC statement pages directly
Source is not useful for RAG purposes as it contains no substantive content

human_review.notes: Source is a Federal Reserve index page for 2025 FOMC press releases. Functionally equivalent to a listing_page despite PAGE_TYPE showing 'press_release'. Individual FOMC statements would need to be archived separately for actual research use. Recommend linking to individual statement URLs rather than this index.

notes: Non-archivable listing page. Does not contain actual FOMC statement content, policy decisions, or any substantive material for research. This index page merely enumerates dates of FOMC meetings in 2025 without providing the actual statements or projections. For archival purposes, each individual FOMC statement should be fetched separately from the Federal Reserve website.
